2007 
Nevermore by Nate Cull
Weishaupt Scholars by Michael Martin
Fear by Chuan-Tze Teo
Common Ground by Stephen Granade
Mother Loose by Irene Callaci
Lost Pig by Grunk
An Act of Murder by Hugh Dunnett
Lord Bellwater's Secret by Sam Gordon
House of Dream of Moon by the IF Whispers Team
Spur by Kent Tessman
The Day I Shot Hitler by Marius Müller
Nazi Mice by Ricardo Dague
The War On New Year's by Sam Kabo Ashwell
Not the Same Auld Lang Syne by Jacqueline A Lott

2012 
My Evil Twin by Carl Muckenhoupt
Fingertips: I Hear the Wind Blow by Jacqueline A. Lott
[NF] A Comedy of Error Messages by Adam Le Doux
The Statue Got Me High by Ryan Veeder
Spider by Andrew Schultz
The Guitar (The Lion Sleeps Tonight) by Alonso, Havasi, and Grimm
[NF] Endless, Nameless by Adam Cadre

2025 
The eight-headed giant by Zeno Pillan
Thornfell Manor: 1984 by Tijn Kersjes
No More by Tabith
Good Bones by xyzoe and IronSerenity
Monk by the Sea by Elizabeth Decoste
Wild West by Bonaventura Di Bello, Garry Francis, and Gianluca Girelli
Tin Star by Bonaventura Di Bello, Garry Francis, and Gianluca Girelli
Desperados by Bonaventura Di Bello, Garry Francis, and Gianluca Girelli
